close_reason:
All compilation errors fixed. Build succeeds with 0 errors.

Changes made:
1. Added ErrorCodes.InternalError constant to src/SharpClaw.Protocol.Contracts/Errors.cs
2. Fixed WebSocketGatewayEndpoint.cs style issues (blank line, unused params)
3. Updated DockerSandboxProvider tests to use NullLogger<DockerSandboxProvider>.Instance
4. Completely rewrote Identity tests to use new async API with tenantId parameters
5. Added NSubstitute package to test projects for mocking
6. Added required project references to Abstractions and Persistence.Contracts
7. Added NSubstitute version to Directory.Packages.props for CPM

Test Results:
- Identity.UnitTests: 6 passed
- Identity.IntegrationTests: 2 passed
- Execution.Docker.UnitTests: 1 passed, 2 failed (require Docker daemon)
description:
Fix approximately 37 build errors in test projects due to API signature changes:

1. DockerSandboxProvider now requires ILogger constructor parameter
2. IdentityService changed to use IRepository<DeviceIdentityEntity> with tenantId parameters
3. IIdentityService.Authorize() now requires tenantId and requiredScopes parameters
4. WebSocketGatewayEndpoint rewritten with new signature
5. ControlUiEndpoints uses new IIdentityService interface

Test projects affected:
- tests/SharpClaw.Execution.UnitTests/SandboxManagerUnitTests.cs
- tests/SharpClaw.Identity.UnitTests/*.cs
- tests/SharpClaw.Gateway.UnitTests/*.cs
title: Fix unit test compilation errors in SharpClaw

close_reason: Implemented RunCoordinator-backed OpenResponses SSE stream mapping and validated behavior with integration, end2end, and full solution test passes.
description: Replace static SSE events in /v1/responses stream mode with events sourced from RunCoordinator.ReadEventsAsync; preserve response.created/in_progress/output_text.delta/completed mapping and validate malformed requests.
notes:
- /v1/responses stream mode now sources SSE events from RunCoordinator.ReadEventsAsync instead of static canned events.
- SSE mapping implemented: run.running -> response.in_progress, run.delta -> response.output_text.delta, run.completed -> response.completed (completed), run.aborted -> response.completed (cancelled), run.failed -> response.completed (failed).
- Existing validations unchanged (model/input required with INVALID_REQUEST).
- Test evidence: OpenResponses integration tests pass, OpenResponses end2end tests pass, full solution tests pass.
title: Wire OpenResponses SSE to RunCoordinator events
Stabilize Daytona integration testcontainers lifecycle
